job_name = 'eval-job'

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("job_name", JOB_NAMES)
    def test_task_yaml_parseable(job_name):
        yaml_path = os.path.join(TASKS_DIR, f"{job_name}.yaml")
        result = subprocess.run(
